login.desc: Sign in with Discord to access the system dashboard
login.errorOauth: Discord verification failed. Please try later.
login.errorUnauth: You must be logged in first.

verify.desc: Enter the verification code to access the dashboard

home.adminOnly: Only servers where you have management permission

guild.welcomeSub: You are now managing this server

tickets.pageDesc: Manage your server's support ticket system, configure settings and monitor activity.
tickets.settingsDesc: Configure the ticket system behaviour for your server.
tickets.cardGeneralDesc: Ticket limits, language, close behaviour, feedback & more.
tickets.cardPanelsDesc: Customise ticket panels and open buttons.
tickets.cardCategoriesDesc: Organise tickets into categories with individual settings.
tickets.generalDesc: Core behaviour settings applied to all tickets in this server.
tickets.limitHelp: Maximum number of open tickets a user can have simultaneously. Prevents spam.
tickets.langHelp: Language used for all ticket messages, buttons and automatic responses.
tickets.allowCloseHelp: When ON, members can close their own ticket using the Close button.
tickets.confirmHelp: Shows a confirmation prompt before closing to prevent accidental closures.
tickets.feedbackHelp: After a ticket is closed, ask the user to rate the support (1–5 stars).
tickets.anonHelp: Hides member names in the dashboard, showing only User IDs.
tickets.threadHelp: Creates tickets as threads inside a channel instead of separate channels.
tickets.disableOpenHelp: Disables the slash command for opening tickets (useful if using panels only).
tickets.channelsSectionDesc: Configure where tickets are created, logged, and where notifications are sent.
tickets.notifChannelHelp: A message is posted here when a ticket is opened, closed, or claimed.
tickets.transcriptChannelHelp: Ticket transcripts (HTML/TXT) are uploaded here after a ticket is closed.
tickets.overflowCategoryHelp: Used when the primary category reaches Discord's 50-channel limit.
tickets.channelCategoryHelp: The main category where new ticket channels are created.
tickets.namingSchemeHelp: How ticket channels are named. Supports {user}, {number}, {date}.
tickets.welcomeMsgHelp: First message sent inside the ticket. Supports Discord markdown and mentions.
tickets.welcomeMsgPlaceholder:
Thank you for contacting support.
Please describe your issue.
tickets.claimSectionDesc: Control who can see and interact with claimed tickets.
tickets.claimViewHelp: ON: all staff can see a claimed ticket. OFF: only the claimer can view it.
tickets.claimTypeHelp: ON: all staff can send messages. OFF: only the claimer can type.
tickets.autoCloseSectionDesc: Automatically close inactive or abandoned tickets.
tickets.acLeaveHelp: Auto-close the ticket if the user who opened it leaves the server.
tickets.acNoResponseHelp: Auto-close if the user hasn't replied since opening (0 = disabled).
tickets.acLastMsgHelp: Auto-close after a period of no activity in the ticket (0 = disabled).
tickets.permSectionDesc: Control who can open tickets and what actions are allowed inside them.
tickets.openPermHelp: Who is allowed to open a ticket?
tickets.addMsgSenderHelp: If a ticket is opened via a message button, the message author is also added to the ticket channel.
tickets.permAttachHelp: Allow ticket participants to upload files.
tickets.permEmbedHelp: Allow ticket participants to send embedded links.
tickets.permReactHelp: Allow ticket participants to add emoji reactions.
tickets.appearSectionDesc: Customise the look and feel of ticket components.
tickets.colorSuccessHelp: Used for: open ticket, claim, successful feedback.
tickets.colorFailureHelp: Used for: no permission, ticket limit reached.
tickets.hideCloseHelp: Completely hide the close button from ticket channels.
tickets.hideCloseReasonHelp: Hide the "Close with reason" option from the close menu.
tickets.hideClaimHelp: Completely hide the claim button from ticket channels.
tickets.panelsDesc: Create and manage ticket panels that members can use to open support tickets.
tickets.multiPanelDesc: Group multiple ticket panels into a single combined message with a select menu.
tickets.mpChannelHelp: The channel where the combined multi-panel message will be sent.
tickets.mpPanelsHelp: Type the name of an existing panel and press Add.
tickets.mpMinWarn: At least 2 panels are required for a multi-panel.
tickets.mpUseDropdownHelp: ON: panels shown inside a select dropdown. OFF: panels shown as separate buttons.
tickets.mpPlaceholderHelp: The default instruction text shown inside the dropdown before a selection is made.
tickets.mpCustomizeHelp: Override the button text, emoji, or colour for each panel within this multi-panel without changing the original panel.
tickets.mpCustomizeEmpty: Add panels above to customise them individually.
tickets.mentionOnOpenHelp: Ping this role when a new ticket is opened.
tickets.panelTranscriptHelp: Where ticket transcripts are sent. Choose 'Use global setting' to inherit the server default.
tickets.deleteMentionsHelp: Automatically delete the role-mention message after it is sent.
tickets.createAsThreadHelp: Use threads instead of channels for tickets created from this panel.
tickets.threadNotifHelp: Post a notification in this channel when a new thread ticket is created.
tickets.cooldownHelp: Minimum seconds a member must wait before opening another ticket.
tickets.ticketCategoryHelp: Discord category where ticket channels are created.
tickets.maxOpenHelp: Set to 0 for unlimited. Users cannot open more tickets than this limit.
tickets.formHelp: Ask members to fill a form when opening this panel.
tickets.exitSurveyHelp: A form presented to the member when the ticket is closed.
tickets.awaitingCatHelp: Move the ticket channel to this category while waiting for a staff response.
tickets.panelContentHelp: The text shown in the panel embed. Supports Markdown.
tickets.panelContentPlaceholder: Click the button below to open a ticket.
tickets.panelColorHelp: Colour of the panel embed's left border.
tickets.panelChannelHelp: Select the channel where the panel message will be sent.
tickets.disablePanelHelp: Temporarily disable this panel so no new tickets can be opened.
tickets.btnColorHelp: Discord button colour for the open-ticket button.
tickets.btnEmojiHelp: Optional emoji to show on the button (standard emoji or custom Discord emoji ID).
tickets.largeImageHelp: Full-width image shown at the bottom of the embed.
tickets.smallImageHelp: Small image shown in the top-right of the embed.
tickets.welcomeDescPlaceholder: Thank you for contacting support. A staff member will be with you shortly.
tickets.welcomeTimestampHelp: Append the current date and time to the embed footer.
tickets.aclHelp: Control which roles or users can open tickets from this panel.
tickets.supportHoursHelp: Restrict when members can open tickets from this panel.
tickets.alwaysOpenHelp: When enabled, members can open tickets at any time.

promo.title: Help keep this project alive
promo.desc: Next Generation is free & open-source. A quick ⭐ on GitHub or a Trustpilot review makes a huge difference and helps keep it free for everyone.

autoRoles.configureRolesAssignedAutomaticallyWhenH: Configure roles assigned automatically when humans or bots join the server.
autoRoles.addedAutomaticallyToEveryNewHuman: Added automatically to every new human member
autoRoles.addedAutomaticallyToEveryNewBot: Added automatically to every new bot added to the server

levels.tracksUserLevelsAndActivityWith: Tracks user levels and activity, with commands to reset levels, view top rankings, and more.
levels.ifAnyOfTheRolesHave: If any of the roles have administrative permissions, the feature will not work.
levels.rolesMustBeOrderedFromLowest: Roles must be ordered from lowest to highest required level.

moderation.containsVariousModerationCommandsLikeBan: Contains various moderation commands like ban, mute, warn, and role management.
moderation.typeThenPressEnterToAdd: Type then press Enter to add...
moderation.grantsAnyMemberWithAdministratorPermissi: Grants any member with Administrator permission access to this command
moderation.addThisUserToAllowedList: Add this user to allowed list?

protection.configureServerProtectionAgainstHarmfulA: Configure server protection against harmful actions
protection.youCannotEditProtectionSettingsAsk: You cannot edit protection settings. Ask an admin to grant access from Settings.
protection.toggleAllProtectionModulesOnOr: Toggle all protection modules on or off at once
protection.theseRolesAreExemptFromAll: These roles are exempt from all protection modules
protection.numbersUsedWhenSelectingAnAction: Numbers used when selecting an action per module
protection.numberOfActionsPer10sBefore: Number of actions per 10s before punishment

setting.customizeTheBotProfileAndSystem: Customize the bot profile and system settings
setting.allowUsingCommandsWithAPrefix: Allow using commands with a prefix (e.g. !help)
setting.chooseTheSymbolThatPrecedesCommands: Choose the symbol that precedes commands
setting.theTypeOfActivityDisplayedOn: The type of activity displayed on the bot
setting.theTextShownNextToThe: The text shown next to the activity type
setting.presenceStatusShownForTheBot: Presence status shown for the bot on Discord
setting.usersListedHereCanAccessAnd: Users listed here can access and edit the Security page. The first user is the top admin. If the list is empty, only dashboard owners have access.
setting.noUsersAddedDashboardOwnersHave: No users added — dashboard owners have access
setting.addThisUserToProtectionAccess: Add this user to protection access?
setting.removeThisUserFromProtectionAccess: Remove this user from protection access?

systemSettings.systemControlPanelRestrictedToAuthorized: System control panel — restricted to authorized users only
systemSettings.controlDashboardBehaviourVerificationAnd: Control dashboard behaviour, verification and intro page
systemSettings.showAnimatedIntroOnFirstVisit: Show animated intro on first visit
systemSettings.requireUsersToEnterACode: Require users to enter a code after logging in
systemSettings.controlWhichServersTheBotIs: Control which servers the bot is allowed to join
systemSettings.botCanJoinAnyServerWithout: Bot can join any server without restrictions
systemSettings.botAutoLeavesServersNotIn: Bot auto-leaves servers not in the allowed list
systemSettings.typeOrPasteAnIDThen: Type or paste an ID then press Enter...
systemSettings.pressEnterOrToAddAn: Press Enter or , to add an ID — click × to remove
systemSettings.automaticallySendActivityLogsToA: Automatically send activity logs to a Discord webhook
systemSettings.addOrRemoveDiscordIDsThat: Add or remove Discord IDs that have access to this settings page
systemSettings.addOrRemoveDiscordIDsListed: Add or remove Discord IDs listed as dashboard owners
systemSettings.shipsCurrentlyConnectedToTheDashboard: Ships currently connected to the dashboard
systemSettings.dashboardLoginsBotServerAdditionsAnd: Dashboard logins, bot server additions, and other activities
systemSettings.addThisUserToShipsAccess: Add this user to Ships access?
systemSettings.chooseWhatHappensAfterTheBot: Choose what happens after the bot leaves:
systemSettings.botLeavesButAllServerData: Bot leaves but all server data is kept
systemSettings.botLeavesAndAllServerData: Bot leaves and all server data is permanently deleted
systemSettings.botIsNotInAnyServer: Bot is not in any server
systemSettings.logClearReqBody: Requires approval from all Ships ({n}). If anyone rejects, the request is cancelled.
systemSettings.botWasAdded: Bot was added to this server
systemSettings.clearReqSent: Clear request sent — awaiting team approval
systemSettings.enterValidIdError: Enter a valid Discord User ID
systemSettings.noIpRecorded: No IP recorded for geo lookup
systemSettings.autoBackupDesc: Mirror your database to one or more backup clusters in real-time
systemSettings.autoBackupEmpty: No backup targets — click + Add Target to get started
systemSettings.autoBackupUriEditHint: Leave blank to keep the current URI
systemSettings.autoBackupRunConfirm: Start a full backup to this target now?
systemSettings.autoBackupDeleteConfirm: Delete this backup target? This cannot be undone.
systemSettings.autoBackupUriInvalid: URI must start with mongodb:// or mongodb+srv://
systemSettings.autoBackupIntervalInvalid: Interval must be between 1 and 43200 minutes

ticketsOverview.whichPanelGetsTheMostRequests: Which panel gets the most requests
ticketsOverview.bestSupportHoursByDayOf: Best support hours by day of week × hour (UTC)
ticketsOverview.avgCloseTimePerStaffMember: Avg close time per staff member
ticketsOverview.avgResolutionTimeDailyLast30: Avg resolution time daily — last 30 days
ticketsOverview.totalTicketsClosedPerStaffMember: Total tickets closed per staff member
ticketsOverview.last7DaysWithQuickPeriod: Last 7 days with quick period comparison
ticketsOverview.fromMostTicketsHandledToLeast: From most tickets handled to least
ticketsOverview.goodVsBadRatingRatioAt: Good vs bad rating ratio at a glance
ticketsOverview.whichPanelScoredHighestInSatisfaction: Which panel scored highest in satisfaction
ticketsOverview.avgRatingOverTimeLast30: Avg Rating Over Time — Last 30 Days
ticketsOverview.staffRankedByAverageCustomerSatisfaction: Staff ranked by average customer satisfaction score

ticketsGeneral.addsARulesButtonToThe: Adds a Rules button to the ticket welcome message. Clicking it shows the rules text ephemerally.
ticketsGeneral.textShownToTheUserWhen: Text shown to the user when they click the Rules button (supports Markdown).
ticketsGeneral.buttonLabelEmojiAndColorShown: Button label, emoji and color shown in the ticket welcome message.
ticketsGeneral.label: Label
ticketsGeneral.showsAnEscalateButtonInThe: Shows an Escalate button in the ticket welcome message. Clicking it moves the ticket to another category.
ticketsGeneral.selectTheCategoriesTheTicketCan: Select the categories the ticket can be moved to (max 25).
ticketsGeneral.noCategoriesFoundInThisServer: No categories found in this server.

ticketsPanels.saveAFullHTMLTranscriptWhen: Save a full HTML transcript when this ticket is closed
ticketsPanels.sendTheHTMLTranscriptFileTo: Send the HTML transcript file to the ticket creator via direct message
ticketsPanels.rolesSpecificToThisPanelThey: Roles specific to this panel — they can view the ticket and use all admin buttons (close, claim, add/remove user).
ticketsPanels.chooseWhetherTheTicketActionControls: Choose whether the ticket action controls appear as individual buttons or a single select menu.
ticketsPanels.emojiUnicodeLikeOrServerEmoji: Emoji: Unicode like 🔒 or server emoji as <:name:id>. Style: Primary=Blue / Secondary=Grey / Success=Green / Danger=Red.
ticketsPanels.showADiscordModalWithUp: Show a Discord modal with up to 5 questions when the user opens this panel.
ticketsPanels.askTheUserForA1: Ask the user for a 1–5 star rating after the ticket is closed
ticketsPanels.starRatingCardIsSentVia: Star-rating card is sent via DM — enabled automatically when ratings are on
ticketsPanels.channelWhereEachSubmittedRatingIs: Channel where each submitted rating is posted. Leave empty to only save locally
ticketsPanels.roleToMentionInTheResults: Role to @mention in the results channel when a new rating is received
ticketsPanels.textShownBelowTheTitleInside: Text shown below the title inside the panel message. Supports Discord markdown.
ticketsPanels.clickTheButtonBelowToOpen: Click the button below to open a ticket...
ticketsPanels.pNGJPGJPEGWEBPMax20: PNG, JPG, JPEG, WEBP — max 20 MB. Leave blank for no image.
ticketsPanels.colouredAccentStripeOnTheLeft: Coloured accent stripe on the left of the panel message in Discord.
ticketsPanels.youCanUseASelectMenu: You can use a select menu even with a single panel.
ticketsPanels.theLabelAndEmojiFieldsAbove: The Label and Emoji fields above are used as the option label & icon in the select menu.
ticketsPanels.shortTextShownBelowTheOption: Short text shown below the option name in the select menu (max 50 chars).
ticketsPanels.textShownBeforeTheUserPicks: Text shown before the user picks an option.
ticketsPanels.addsAButtonBelowTheSelect: Adds a button below the select menu that re-sends it when clicked
ticketsPanels.textShownOnTheRefreshButton: Text shown on the refresh button
ticketsPanels.shownAsALargeHeadingAt: Shown as a large heading at the top of the multi-panel message.
ticketsPanels.textShownBelowTheTitleSupports: Text shown below the title. Supports Discord markdown.
ticketsPanels.clickAButtonOrSelectFrom: Click a button or select from the menu to open a ticket...
ticketsPanels.colouredAccentStripeOnTheLeft2: Coloured accent stripe on the left of the multi-panel message.
ticketsPanels.deletesAllPanelsAndMultiPanels: Deletes all panels and multi-panels (which depend on them), open tickets and cooldowns. Cannot be undone.
ticketsPanels.deletesOnlyMultiPanelsWhileKeeping: Deletes only multi-panels while keeping single panels intact.
ticketsPanels.permanentlyDeletesAllPanelsMultiPanels: Permanently deletes all panels, multi-panels, open tickets, feedback and cooldowns. Cannot be undone.
ticketsPanels.onlyPNGJPGJPEGWEBPAllowed: Only PNG, JPG, JPEG, WEBP allowed.
ticketsPanels.allPanelsTicketsAndRecordsWill: All panels, tickets and records will be permanently deleted. Type the word below to confirm.
ticketsPanels.allPanelsMultiPanelsOpenTickets: All panels, multi-panels, open tickets and cooldowns will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
ticketsPanels.allMultiPanelsWillBePermanently: All multi-panels will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
ticketsPanels.panelNotFoundMakeSureIt: Panel not found. Make sure it is saved first.
ticketsPanels.saveThePanelFirstBeforeSending: Save the panel first before sending.
ticketsPanels.saveTheMultiPanelFirstBefore: Save the multi-panel first before sending.

utility.containsVariousGeneralCommandsForCommon: Contains various general commands for common tasks and server information.
utility.typeThenPressEnterToAdd: Type then press Enter to add...

suggestions.pageDescription: Configure the suggestions system for your server
suggestions.channelDesc: The channel where suggestions will be posted
suggestions.allowThreadsDesc: Create a discussion thread under each suggestion
suggestions.enableVotingDesc: Allow members to vote on suggestions
suggestions.autoThresholdDesc: Automatically change suggestion status based on vote count
suggestions.maxPerDay: Max Suggestions Per User Per Day
suggestions.moderationDesc: Review suggestions before they go public
suggestions.requireRejectReasonDesc: Show a modal for the admin to enter a rejection reason
suggestions.noRolesAdded: No roles added — everyone can submit

embeds.heading: Embed Messages
embeds.desc: Create, manage and send rich embed messages through the bot
embeds.emptyDesc: Click "New Message" to create your first embed message
embeds.saveModalDesc: Choose a name for this message and the channel to send it to.
embeds.tplSaveDesc: Give this flow a name so you can reuse it later.
embeds.jsSessionExpired: Session expired — please log in again
embeds.jsMultiSelHint:
Drag any selected state to move all.
Press Delete or click below to remove all.
embeds.jsEditExistingDesc: Edits the already-sent Discord message in-place
embeds.jsSendAsNewDesc: Sends a brand-new message to the selected channel
embeds.jsUnsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?
embeds.jsStateErrPost: has a transition to a deleted state
embeds.jsAddButtonsFirst: Add buttons or select options in the Components tab first.
embeds.jsNoRoles: No roles found in this server.
embeds.jsPermDesc: Only members with these roles can interact with this state. Leave empty to allow everyone.
embeds.jsCooldownDesc: Seconds a user must wait before interacting again. 0 = no cooldown.
embeds.jsDenyPlaceholder: You don't have permission to do that.
embeds.jsDenyMessageDesc: Sent privately (ephemeral) when role check fails or cooldown is active.
embeds.jsSaveFirst: Save the flow first via Save & Send
embeds.jsUpdateDesc: Update the message name, channel, and send options.
embeds.jsNoTplsDesc: Save your current flow as a template to reuse it later.
embeds.builderNoStatesDesc: Add your first state to begin building the flow
embeds.builderSelectStateDesc: Click any state on the canvas to edit it
embeds.trgNoTriggers: No smart triggers yet. Click Add Trigger to start automating.

welcomeJoin.pageDesc: Customize welcome messages when members join the server
welcomeJoin.templatesDesc: Create message templates sent to channels when members join
welcomeJoin.noTemplates: No templates yet. Click Create Template to add one.
welcomeJoin.welcomeTextHelp: Enable or disable the welcome text message
welcomeJoin.dmWelcomeHelp: Send a DM to the member when they join
welcomeJoin.msgDelayHelp: Delay in seconds before sending the welcome message
welcomeJoin.msgDeleteDelayHelp: Delete the message after this many seconds (0 = never)
welcomeJoin.msgRulesHelp: Send only after the member accepts the server rules
welcomeJoin.msgDeleteLeaveHelp: Remove the welcome message if the member leaves
welcomeJoin.msgIgnoreBotsHelp: Do not send a message when a bot joins
welcomeJoin.msgIgnoreUsersHelp: Only send a message when a bot joins
welcomeJoin.leaveTextHelp: Send a leave text message when members leave
welcomeJoin.randomizedGroupsDesc: Group multiple templates so the bot picks one randomly on each join
welcomeJoin.dynamicImagesDesc: Personalized images that update with the member's avatar and info
welcomeJoin.cmdCreateInvite: Create an invite link for the server
welcomeJoin.noGroups: No groups yet. Create templates first, then group them.
welcomeJoin.componentV2Note: Full Component v2 editor coming in the next release.
